title: Aurelj's Paintings
description: Adds a variety of new vanilla-esque paintings!
body:
![](https://i.postimg.cc/rpm8XPcj/2024-08-20-19-57-20a.png)


**REQUIRES** ARCHITECTURY API

* Now all paintings are shown in the above picture

**Aurelj's Paintings** is a mod that adds a variety of paintings following the style of the latest Minecraft paintings. These paintings were created by using a collage of pixelart and pictures, most of them taken by me. For now, this mod adds _19 paintings_:

![](https://i.postimg.cc/wM6z2fWD/afterlife-export.png)
